title: After the Kikuka Sho: A Father's Blessing

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer claims victory at the Kikuka Sho,
leaving Mejiro McQueen shedding tears of
frustration.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing that, Mejiro Palmer questions whether or
not she herself has that kind of passion for
running.
